untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Bull market context detection — no single allowed indicator captures multi-bar trend confirmation; (2) Candle height median calculation — requires statistical computation across historical candles not available as a pre-calculated indicator; (3) Dynamic tall/short classification and conditional measure rule application (8.81%, -6.94%, -10.93%) based on classification — rule engine does not support conditional branching on computed properties; (4) Upward breakout detection requires comparison to prior resistance/support levels not in allowed indicator set
translation_notes: Partially captured white candle (close > open) and upward move (close > prev_close), but core logic of median-based candle classification and performance-table-dependent exit targets cannot be expressed with allowed indicators and operators. The measure rule mechanism is a multi-step computation requiring state that the engine does not support.
